svg.title: AI Change Risk Agent — data flow
svg.desc: Five-stage data flow: upload, parse, AI classify, risk score, return report.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What file types does the upload step accept?')
sendPrompt('What happens during the parse and classify stage?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI agent reason about the change?')
sendPrompt('How does the risk scoring engine work?')
sendPrompt('What does the final risk report contain?')
sendPrompt('How is the result returned to the user?')
sendPrompt('What security checks does the agent perform?')
sendPrompt('What availability checks does the agent run?')
sendPrompt('How does cost impact estimation work?')

g.text: Risk aggregator — weighted score 0–100 → SAFE / REVIEW / BLOCK
